Title: Intelligent Multi-Model Visualisation Framework Using Large Language Models
Venue: International Journal for Research in Applied Science and Engineering Technology
Abstract:
The growth and spread of huge, non-homogeneous datasets in areas like healthcare, finance, and education has also
created significant difficulties in providing data in a way that is useful enough to be accessible to non-expert stakeholders.
Traditional methods of visualization, such as fixed dashboard displays and ready-made charts, have been sufficient as a
communication mechanism to trained analysts but often fail when communicating subtle information to users not prepared in
